judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly identifies Tarcísio de Freitas as the strongest right-wing candidate for president, contradicting the ground truth that he chose not to run.
The response incorrectly states Tarcísio de Freitas as the strongest right-wing candidate for president, contrary to the ground truth.

The response confidently names Tarcísio de Freitas as the strongest right-wing candidate for 2026, which contradicts the ground truth that Tarcísio chose not to run and Flávio Bolsonaro announced his candidacy in December 2025.
